testcase.name: test_get_deleted_transfers_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: tests/test_transfer_restore_feature.py:59: in test_get_deleted_transfers_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_restore_requires_super_admin
testcase.failure: tests/test_transfer_restore_feature.py:117: in test_restore_requires_super_admin assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for ADMIN user, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for ADMIN user, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_restore_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 or 404, got 401 assert 401 in [403, 404] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_transfer_restore_feature.py:128: in test_restore_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [403, 404], f"Expected 403 or 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 or 404, got 401 E assert 401 in [403, 404] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
